\tzpentry{ID4518}{Rabi Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4518 introduces Rabi Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Omega_{\text{Rabi}}' = \Omega\sqrt{1 + N/\pi}$
\]
